availability.title: Room Availability Calendar
availability.description: Review room status by date before creating or changing bookings.
availability.cleaningBlockingNote: Rooms under cleaning or maintenance are automatically blocked from new bookings until the room is inspected and marked available.

profileSettingsDescription: Update your account preferences for this console.
settingsPopupDescription: Open a settings section from your profile menu.
profileSettingsShortDescription: Name, phone, email, and preferred language.
businessSettingsShortDescription: Guesthouse identity and public contact details.
preferencesSettingsShortDescription: Currency, timezone, date format, and language.
notificationSettingsShortDescription: Booking, payment, maintenance, and system alerts.
languagePreferenceDescription: Your selected language is saved to your user profile.
languageUpdateFailed: Could not update your language preference.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Manage account, business, security, system, and notification preferences from one place.

profileSettingsPage.title: Profile Settings
profileSettingsPage.description: Update your personal details and preferred language.
profileSettingsPage.name: Name
profileSettingsPage.emailReadonly: Email is managed by an administrator.

businessSettingsPage.title: Business Settings
businessSettingsPage.description: Manage guesthouse identity and public contact details.
businessSettingsPage.logoDescription: Enter a logo URL. Image upload can be added later.
businessSettingsPage.readonlyDescription: Receptionists can view business settings, but only admins can edit them.

miniBarStoreLinkSection.title: Mini Bar Inventory Store
miniBarStoreLinkSection.description: Link a store business so its product inventory can be used for room mini bar and guest consumption.
miniBarStoreLinkSection.selectStoreDescription: Only store businesses where you are an owner or admin are shown.
miniBarStoreLinkSection.noEligibleStores: No eligible store businesses found. You must be an owner or admin of a store business.
miniBarStoreLinkSection.permissionDeniedDescription: You must be an owner or admin of this guesthouse to manage the mini bar store link.

preferencesSettingsPage.title: System Preferences
preferencesSettingsPage.description: Control default currency, date, timezone, and language behavior.
preferencesSettingsPage.readonlyDescription: Receptionists can view system preferences, but only admins can edit them.
preferencesSettingsPage.currencyDescription: Used in dashboard totals, payments, reports, and invoices.
preferencesSettingsPage.timezoneDescription: Used for date and time display across the system.
preferencesSettingsPage.dateFormatDescription: Used in tables, reports, and generated documents.
preferencesSettingsPage.languageDescription: Used as the default app language when no user preference is set.

notificationSettingsPage.title: Notification Settings
notificationSettingsPage.description: Choose which alerts you want to receive in the console.
notificationSettingsPage.bookingAlertsDescription: Receive alerts for booking creation, check-ins, check-outs, and cancellations.
notificationSettingsPage.paymentAlertsDescription: Receive alerts when payments are created or marked as paid.
notificationSettingsPage.maintenanceAlertsDescription: Receive alerts for maintenance requests and resolved maintenance work.
notificationSettingsPage.systemAlertsDescription: Receive account, role, and system-level announcements.

securitySettingsPage.title: Security Settings
securitySettingsPage.description: Change your password to keep your account secure.
securitySettingsPage.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters.
securitySettingsPage.passwordsMustMatch: New password and confirm password must match.

roleBasedNavigation: Navigation follows each signed-in staff role.
loginDescription: Sign in with a backend user account to open the dashboard.
loginHeroTitle: Calm control for rooms, guests, bookings, and cash flow.
passwordValidation: Password must be at least 6 characters.
loginErrorDescription: Unable to sign in. Check the backend server and try again.
roomPageDescription: Manage room inventory, nightly rates, and availability.
createRoomDescription: Add a room to the guesthouse inventory.
roomImageHelp: Upload jpg, jpeg, png, or webp. Max size 5 MB.
roomImageTypeError: Only jpg, jpeg, png, and webp images are allowed.
roomImageSizeError: Room image must be 5 MB or smaller.
deleteRoomDescription: Room {roomNumber} will be removed from active inventory.
deleteRoomFallbackDescription: This room will be removed from active inventory.
guestPageDescription: Search and manage guest identities, contact details, and ID cards.
searchGuestsPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email
guestDirectoryCount: {count, plural, one {# guest} other {# guests}} in the directory.
guestSearchResults: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for "{search}".
createGuestDescription: Add a guest profile for bookings and payments.
deleteGuestDescription: {name} will be removed from the guest directory.
deleteGuestFallbackDescription: This guest will be removed from the guest directory.
bookingPageDescription: Create reservations, track stay status, and move guests through check-in and check-out.
quickCheckInDescription: Select a confirmed booking to check in.
quickCheckOutDescription: Select a checked-in booking to check out.
noBookingsReadyForCheckIn: No confirmed bookings ready for check-in.
noBookingsReadyForCheckOut: No checked-in bookings ready for check-out.
searchBookingsPlaceholder: Search by booking ID, guest, or room
checkOutAfterCheckIn: Check-out date must be after check-in date.
createBookingDescription: Select a guest, assign a room, and choose the stay dates.
bookingConflictMessage: Room is already booked for the selected dates.
chooseAnotherRoomOrChangeDates: Please choose another room or change the dates.
selectDatesBeforeRoom: Select dates before choosing a room
availableRoomsSelectable: Available rooms are selectable. Booked, occupied, and maintenance rooms are disabled.
roomAvailabilityCouldNotBeLoaded: Could not load room availability for the selected dates.
selectedRoomUnavailable: This room is unavailable because it is {status}. Choose another room or change the dates.
maintenanceRoomsRejected: Maintenance rooms will be rejected by the backend.
nightsAtRate: {nights, plural, one {# night} other {# nights}} at {rate} per night.
roomSelectionHint: Showing each room's current status. Final availability is confirmed against your dates in the next step.
roomAvailableForDates: This room is available for your selected dates.
bookingDetailDescription: Review guest, room, stay dates, and booking lifecycle.
expressStepGuestDescription: Find a returning guest by name or phone
expressStepScheduleDescription: Set the stay dates and cooling option
expressSearchGuestHint: Start typing a guest's name or phone number
estimatedPriceNote: Estimated — final price confirmed by server.
paymentPageDescription: Record guest payments, monitor settlement state, and update payment outcomes.
createPaymentDescription: Link a payment to a booking and choose how it was received.
paymentStatusCouldNotBeUpdated: Payment status could not be updated
quickBookingDescription: Pick a guest, room, and dates to create a booking.
roomAlreadyBookedForDates: This room is already booked for the selected dates.
selectingBookingFillsAmount: Selecting a booking fills the total amount.
reportsPageDescription: Generate operational snapshots from live backend report APIs.
reportFiltersDescription: Select a report type, apply filters, then generate the preview.
revenueReportDescription: Collection totals and paid revenue breakdowns.
bookingReportDescription: Reservations, guest names, room assignments, and statuses.
paymentReportDescription: Payment records with booking and room context.
guestReportDescription: Guest activity summary with paid spending totals.
occupancyReportDescription: Room availability and current occupancy rate.
noReportRows: No report rows match these filters.
generateReportPreview: Generate a report to preview live data.
exportsUseCurrentFilters: Exports use the same filters as the current preview.
profitLossReportDescription: Revenue, expenses, and net profit or loss for the selected period.
combinedProfitLossReportDescription: Revenue, expenses, and net profit or loss for all accessible businesses.
summaryReportDescription: Booking source analytics: online vs. walk-in bookings and revenue for the selected period.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.description: Review booking, payment, maintenance, and system activity.

usersPage.title: Users
usersPage.name: Name
usersPage.tableCaption: {count, plural, one {# user can access the console.} other {# users can access the console.}}
usersPage.editUserDescription: Update staff profile details and console permissions.
usersPage.deleteUserDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
usersPage.areYouSureDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
usersPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
usersPage.restrictedToAdmins: User management is restricted to administrators.
usersPage.forbiddenDescription: Your current role can manage operations, but not staff accounts.

store.categoriesDescription: Organize products into categories for easy management.
store.productsDescription: Manage store inventory, pricing, stock levels, and product status.
store.createCategoryDescription: Add a category to group store products.
store.deleteCategoryDescription: "{name}" will be removed from this store.
store.deleteCategoryFallback: This category will be removed from the store.
store.createProductDescription: Add a product to the store inventory.
store.deleteProductFallback: This product will be removed from inventory.
store.stockMustBeNonNegative: Stock quantity must be 0 or greater.
store.lowStockMustBeNonNegative: Low stock alert must be 0 or greater.
store.salesDescription: Record and manage store sales, track payments, and manage refunds.
store.newSaleDescription: Add products to cart, choose payment method, and complete the sale.
store.cartEmpty: Cart is empty. Add products above.
store.noActiveProducts: No active products with stock available.
store.confirmCancelDescription: Sale {saleNumber} will be marked as cancelled. Stock will be restored.
store.confirmRefundDescription: Sale {saleNumber} will be marked as refunded. Stock will be restored.
store.suppliersDescription: Manage suppliers for store restocking and purchases.
store.createSupplierDescription: Add a supplier to source products from.
store.deleteSupplierDescription: "{name}" will be removed from the supplier list.
store.purchasesDescription: Record stock purchases from suppliers and update inventory.
store.newPurchaseDescription: Select a supplier, add products with quantities and cost prices, then save as draft or complete.
store.editPurchaseDescription: Update items or supplier for this draft purchase.
store.confirmCompletePurchaseDescription: Purchase {purchaseNumber} will be marked as completed and product stock will be increased.
store.confirmCancelPurchaseDescription: Purchase {purchaseNumber} will be cancelled. No stock changes will occur.
store.noSuppliersYet: No suppliers found. Add a supplier first.

miniBar.title: Mini Bar Consumption
miniBar.description: Track mini bar items consumed by guests, charge them to the room, and manage refunds.
miniBar.guesthouseOnlyDescription: Switch to a guesthouse business to manage mini bar consumption.
miniBar.newConsumptionDescription: Pick a checked-in booking, add mini bar items, then save as a draft or charge immediately.
miniBar.couldNotLoadConsumptions: Could not load mini bar consumptions
miniBar.noEligibleBookings: No checked-in or checked-out bookings available.
miniBar.noStoreLinkedDescription: Link a store to this guesthouse in Settings → Business before charging mini bar items.
miniBar.noEligibleProducts: No active products with stock available in the linked store.
miniBar.cartEmpty: No items added yet. Add products above.
miniBar.confirmChargeDescription: Stock will be reduced from the linked store and the amount will be added to the booking's balance.
miniBar.confirmCancelDescription: This draft will be cancelled. No stock has been reduced yet.
miniBar.confirmRefundDescription: Stock will be restored to the linked store and the amount removed from the booking's balance.
miniBar.noItemsForBooking: No mini bar items for this booking yet.

expenses.expensesDescription: Track and manage business expenses across all categories.
expenses.updateExpenseDescription: Update the details of this expense.

financePage.title: Finance
financePage.description: Revenue, expenses, and profit for the selected period.
financePage.noBusinessDescription: Switch to a business using the selector at the top to view its financial summary.
financePage.businessBreakdownDescription: Financial performance across all accessible businesses.
financePage.noBusinessesDescription: You need owner or admin access to at least one business to view financial data.
financePage.miniBarRevenueDescription: Revenue from charged mini bar consumption

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard
dashboardPage.description: Live room availability, guest flow, and payment activity.
dashboardPage.financeSummaryDescription: Revenue vs. expenses for the selected period.
dashboardPage.hkTodayDescription: Cleaning tasks created or active today.
dashboardPage.hkUrgentDescription: High-priority tasks that need immediate attention.

housekeeping.title: Housekeeping
housekeeping.description: Manage room cleaning tasks, assign staff, and track room readiness.
housekeeping.createTaskDescription: Create a manual cleaning task for a room.
housekeeping.editTaskDescription: Update task priority, assignee, or note.
housekeeping.noTasksFiltered: No tasks match the current filters.
housekeeping.taskInspected: Room inspection complete. Room is now available.
housekeeping.cancelTaskDescription: The task will be marked as cancelled. This cannot be undone.
housekeeping.deleteTaskDescription: This task will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
